onboarding.title: What do you usually read for?
onboarding.description: Three short steps help NexaRead suggest a suitable reading space. You can change these settings later.
onboarding.error: Could not save your preferences. Please try again.

steps.typesTitle: What kinds of documents do you usually read?
steps.goalTitle: What is your main reading goal?
steps.goalDescription: This helps prioritize the right tools.
steps.displayTitle: How do you prefer content to look?
steps.displayDescription: Automatic mode adapts to each document type.

AUTO.title: Automatic by document
AUTO.description: Books, research papers, and technical documents get tailored layouts.

BOOK.title: Book mode
BOOK.description: Spacious pages, a serif typeface, and a gentle paper tone.

CLEAN.title: Clean and focused
CLEAN.description: A clear single column with minimal distractions.

STUDY.title: Study mode
STUDY.description: Prioritizes notes, search, and source citations.

analytics.title: Minimal reading statistics
analytics.description: Optional. Stores only daily time totals, progress, and reading streaks—not detailed behavior streams.

analytics.title: Your reading rhythm
analytics.description: Aggregate statistics help you reflect on progress without adding pressure.
analytics.disabled: Statistics are off. NexaRead does not store daily reading-time totals.
analytics.privacy: Only daily aggregates are stored. You can disable and delete them at any time.
